phases.result:
Planning pipeline complete. **Phase 11 (Plan Comprehension Gate):** skipped — small single-chain, low/medium-risk plan, headless run.

## ✅ Planning complete — Epic #12

**Multi-User Project & Task Management REST API** — [issue #12](https://github.com/dsj1984/bench-sbx-2026-07-11-epic-scope-mandrel-7183e697/issues/12), now `agent::ready`.

### What ran (headless `/plan --idea … --yes`)
- **Scope triage** → `epic` (three capabilities + real dependency chain).
- **Ideation off-ramp** (spec was already crisply scoped) → one-pager → Epic body opened with 5 canonical sections + User Stories.
- **Clarity gate:** `clear`. **Phase 7:** Tech Spec (Delivery Slicing–led) + Acceptance Table (14 AC rows) + risk verdict folded into the Epic body. Risk **medium** (visible-behavior / public-api / security); `requiresReview` auto-proceeded under `--yes`.
- **Phase 8:** 8.3 consolidation **skipped** (draft matched Delivery Slicing 1:1); 8.4 reachability **no-op** (JSON API, no nav); **8.5 pre-mortem** ran as a fresh-context sub-agent and surfaced 4 real findings, which I applied as a one-pass refinement before persist.
- **Validated** clean against `main`, persisted, healthcheck `ok`.

### Backlog (4 Stories, 4 waves — dependency chain)
| Wave | Story | Scope |
|---|---|---|
| 0 | **#13** | Persistence layer + `node:http` server + pluggable routing/auth-mount seam, `npm start` |
| 1 | **#14** | Register/login, salted hashing, HMAC bearer tokens, auth verifier |
| 2 | **#15** | Owner-scoped project CRUD + task cascade-delete |
| 3 | **#16** | Task CRUD: pagination, `?done=` filter, project isolation |

### Key decisions worth noting
- **Store:** `node:sqlite` (built-in) with an atomic JSON-file fallback behind one repository interface — both satisfy the "survives restart" criterion; no external deps.
- **Pre-mortem-driven fix:** the Foundation Story explicitly owns the shared seams (full repository API + convention-mounted routes + auth injection point) so Stories 2–4 stay **create-only** and never need undeclared edits to core files.
- **Base-branch reality:** `main` tracks only `.gitignore` + `README.md`, so `package.json` is declared `creates` (a fresh story worktree from `main` won't have it) — this is why the assumption gate passed.

**Next step (not run this session — plan→deliver is a hard stop):** `/deliver 12` to run the wave loop, or `/deliver 13` to drive the Wave-0 Foundation Story directly.

`/deliver 12 --yes` is complete. Epic #12 delivered end-to-end and merged to `main`.

## Summary

**Delivered:** A multi-user Project & Task Management JSON REST API — Node.js, ESM, zero external web/runtime dependencies.

**Wave loop (strict dependency chain 13→14→15→16, one Story per beat):**
| Story | Scope | Result |
|---|---|---|
| #13 | Persistence (`node:sqlite` w/ atomic JSON-file fallback), `node:http` server, auto-mounting router + injectable auth seam, error boundary, `npm start` | ✅ merged |
| #14 | `POST /auth/register` + `/auth/login`, scrypt password hashing, HMAC-SHA256 bearer tokens, auth verifier | ✅ merged |
| #15 | Owner-scoped project CRUD, 404-no-leak isolation, task cascade delete | ✅ merged |
| #16 | Task CRUD under owned project, pagination + `?done` filter, cross-project/user isolation | ✅ merged |

**Gate results:**
- **Phase 3 close-validation:** lint ✅, test ✅ (34/34)
- **Phase 4/5 epic-close audit + code review:** 0 blocking (🔴) findings; 3 low-severity observations logged non-blocking (assigneeId/done overloaded onto description/status columns; non-numeric `PORT` not validated; assigneeId existence not enforced — none violate the ACs)
- **Phase 6 retro:** compact (clean run, zero friction)
- **Phase 6.5 integration gate:** silent no-op (no nav/journey surface — a JSON API)
- **Black-box verification:** registered/logged-in users, project & task CRUD, pagination, `?done` filter, 401 gating, cross-user 404-no-leak isolation, cascade delete, malformed-JSON→400 (server stays up), and **data persistence across a server restart** — all confirmed against a live spawned server.

**Terminal state:**
- PR **#17 merged** to `main` (squash `6faf5f8`). Auto-merge fail-safe declined arming because this repo has no CI checks (an unreadable required-check probe, not a red signal); per the headless `--yes` contract I merged as operator.
- Epic #12 → `agent::done` / CLOSED; Stories #13–16 CLOSED.
- Phase 9 cleanup reaped all 5 branches, archived `temp/epic-12/`; local checkout back on `main`, up to date with origin.
- Final check: merged `main` boots via `npm start` and serves requests. ✅

One housekeeping note: I added `temp/` and `.worktrees/` to `.git/info/exclude` (local-only, not committed) so the delivery preflight's clean-tree guard would pass — protocol §6 treats `temp/` as git-excluded, but the seed `.gitignore` didn't list it.
